dependencies.title: Dependencies
dependencies.description: Review tools, blockers, and recommended fixes before installation.

install.title: Install OpenClaw
install.description: Run the selected installer and follow the live execution log.

configure.title: Configure OpenClaw
configure.description: Choose the instance, model setup, and channels that OpenClaw should use.

initialize.title: Initialize OpenClaw
initialize.description: Install the default starter pack and any extra skills or packages you need.

verify.title: Verify installation
verify.description: Confirm the install, provider, channels, and skills are ready.

dependencies.ready: Everything needed for installation is ready.

install.existingInstall: An existing installation was detected. You can continue with configuration or verification.
install.description: Install OpenClaw with the selected method and keep the live log visible until it finishes.

config.channelsDescription: Keep the currently connected channels or enable more channels for notifications and workflow delivery.

validation.provider: Select an instance, provider, and default model before saving configuration.

initialize.defaultPackDescription: The wizard preselects a recommended pack so OpenClaw is useful immediately after setup.

validation.instance: Select a target instance before initialization.

verify.description: OpenClaw has been installed. Review the readiness items below before closing the wizard.
